entities.name: Classification Rules
entities.context: Framework for categorizing workspace root files into DELETE, ASK, or PROTECTED categories

entities.name: DELETE
entities.context: File category for conversation artifacts and temporary docs, moved to Trash

entities.name: ASK
entities.context: File category requiring manual review before action

entities.name: PROTECTED
entities.context: File category for items that should never be touched

entities.name: Function files
entities.context: AI prompt templates marked as conversation artifacts

entities.name: Companion files
entities.context: Reference files marked as conversation artifacts

entities.name: Real-Time_Thought_Partner
entities.context: System prompts that should be stored elsewhere

entities.name: Trash
entities.context: Destination for files classified as DELETE

entities.name: Xnip
entities.context: Screenshot tool producing files that need manual review

relationships.context: DELETE is one of three classification categories
ASK is one of three classification categories
PROTECTED is one of three classification categories
Files classified DELETE are moved to Trash
Function files are classified as DELETE
Companion files are classified as DELETE
Real-Time_Thought_Partner files are classified as DELETE
